title: Delicate Turkish Kofte with Potatoes
description: A flavorful and light Turkish-inspired dish featuring delicate kofte served with roasted potatoes.
instructions: Toss potatoes with 1 tbsp olive oil, salt, and black pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast potatoes in the oven for 20 minutes.
While potatoes are roasting, prepare the kofte according to package instructions.
Once potatoes are done, add the kofte to the baking sheet and toss with remaining 1 tbsp olive oil and Turkish seasoning.
Return to the oven for an additional 5-7 minutes, until the kofte is lightly browned.
Serve the kofte and potatoes hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
